title: PARENTING SUPPORT - 211info
text: COLONIA LIBERTAD PARENTING SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting support such as community cafes, the Casa Infantil Project, Strengthening Families Parenting Classes, advocacy, diapers, baby formula, and other baby items. 2921 Saddle Club Street SE #1009 Salem, OR 97317 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday noon-6pm Email (503) 315-2290 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 315-2290 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for an appointment. Walk-ins may be accepted on a case-by-case basis. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday noon-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: The office is located in the main building of the Colonia Libertad apartment complex. Enter the main building through a side door on Saddle Club Road or through the main entrance across from the children's playground. Parking is available in the spaces labeled OFFICE or along Saddle Club Street. Bus Route #11 Services: Diapers Formula/Baby Food Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - EMERGENCY FOOD ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY WELLNESS PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - POSITIVE YOUTH DEVELOPMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COLONIA LIBERTAD
